params.name: Testament of Flamel
params.description:
On Jan 15, 1417 AD, Nicolas Flamel's funeral was held as scheduled, leaving endless mysteries for the world.
Nicolas Flamel used to be an ordinary copyist. By chance, he obtained a strange document called "The Book of Abraham the Jew." He spent 21 years deciphering it and, with the guidance of a predecessor, succeeded in creating the legendary Philosopher's Stone. Later, he revealed this secret in the form of a will to his nephew. Although the content was obscure, he still managed to pass on …
params.skill1: [[File:Offeringegg skill I.png|50px]]Place in Offering Egg: Green rewards from this egg turn Blue by 1%
